children.name: CLI tool: gantt list/add/update/delete
children.description:
TypeScript CLI run via `tsx scripts/gantt.ts`, consumed by LLMs so they can query and mutate project.json without reading the whole blob.

**Language: TypeScript (Node).** Chosen over Rust/Go so the CLI can import `src/lib/types.ts` and `src/lib/stores/gantt/helpers.ts` directly. Single source of truth for schema + tree ops; schema drift in another language would silently corrupt project.json on write.

**Architecture:**
- Extract mutation logic from `ganttStore.svelte.ts` into a new `src/lib/stores/gantt/mutations.ts` — pure functions over a `Project`, shared by the Svelte store and the CLI.
- `scripts/gantt.ts` handles arg parsing, output formatting, atomic file I/O (temp + rename), and calls into `mutations.ts`.
- After every write the CLI regenerates `project_llm.json` via the existing `buildLlmExport()` so the lean LLM sidecar stays in sync.
- App's file watcher (fixed in v0.1.24) picks up CLI writes live — user sees edits appear in the chart in real time.

**Commands (v1):** list, show, up-next, add task, add todo, add dep, update, delete, toggle-todo, remove dep.

**Task references:** accept name (fuzzy unique match) OR ID prefix, so LLMs don't have to carry full IDs.

**Project discovery:** auto-walk upward from CWD for `.ganttapp` marker; `--project <path>` overrides.

**Known limitation:** race between CLI writes and app's debounced save if the user is typing in the app at the same time. Skip for v1 — intended workflow is LLM-edits-while-user-watches, no concurrent typing.

todos.text: Refactor: extract mutation logic from ganttStore into pure mutations.ts (addTask, updateTask, deleteTask + cleanDeps, addTodo, addDep, etc.)
Wire ganttStore methods to call mutations.ts — store keeps reactive state + save triggering, mutations stay pure
Create scripts/gantt.ts with arg parsing and command dispatcher
Project discovery: walk up from CWD for .ganttapp marker, --project override
Task reference resolver: fuzzy name match unique-or-bail, fall back to ID prefix
Atomic writer: write project.json.tmp, fsync, rename; then same for project_llm.json via buildLlmExport()
Write commands: delete <task> (uses cleanDependencies to strip dangling refs)
Add `gantt` npm script (tsx scripts/gantt.ts) — works with `npm run gantt -- list`
Manual test: run CLI while app is open, verify file watcher refreshes the chart live
Document commands + examples in README or docs/cli.md
